release_notes:
- v2.35.0 adds an access-token refresh grace period to reduce repeated logins.
- It fixes Android listening sessions showing as Abs iOS and fixes m4b RSS feed Content-Type handling.
- Book and podcast descriptions from audio files are sanitized, socket-event validation was tightened, and translations were updated.
